description: issue #206: `pen_up`/`pen_down` take no arguments; the parenthesized form `(pen_down 1 2)` supplies two, raising `ol-too-many-inputs` at runtime (the bare form's extra tokens would instead fail at parse time as a stray-token diagnostic, since pen_up/pen_down's registered arity is 0 - see packages/parser/src/signatures.ts).
